sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70679" key="nh=cis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νῆξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">νήχω</etym>) <sense id="n70679.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swimming,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:68" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">68</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.27</biblScope> </bibl>: pl., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:149" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">149</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1091c</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.56</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
